name: sidemail
description: Sidemail.io's official MCP Server. Provides Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration for Sidemail.io, enabling programmatic access to Sidemail's transactional emails, contacts, domains, and Messenger features for product updates and newsletters via MCP agent mode (in VS Code, Claude, Cursor and other MCP clients).
